name: Boss Luck
description: Increases the quality of boss rewards in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{BOSS_LUCK}.

name: Looting
description: Increases the quality of mob loot drops in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{LOOT_QUALITY}.

name: Help of the Fairies
description: Start every run in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} with an invisible %{ITEM:REVIVESTONE}.

name: Health Essence
description: Increases your base %{STAT:HEALTH} in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{HEALTH}.

name: Defense Essence
description: Increases your base %{STAT:DEFENSE} in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{DEFENSE}.

name: Strength Essence
description: Increases your base %{STAT:STRENGTH} in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{STRENGTH}.

name: Intelligence Essence
description: Increases your base %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE} in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{INTELLIGENCE}.

name: Critical Essence
description: Increases your base %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} in %{ZONE:THE_CATACOMBS} by %{CRIT_DAMAGE}.

name: Forbidden Health
description: Increases your %{STAT:HEALTH} by %{HEALTH}

name: Forbidden Defense
description: Increases your %{STAT:DEFENSE} by %{DEFENSE}

name: Forbidden Speed
description: Increases your %{STAT:WALK_SPEED} by %{WALK_SPEED}

name: Forbidden Intelligence
description: Increases your %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE} by %{INTELLIGENCE}

name: Forbidden Strength
description: Increases your %{STAT:STRENGTH} by %{STRENGTH}

name: Forbidden Blessing
description: Blessing are %{BLESSING_EFFECTIVENESS} more effective on you.

name: Echoes of the Lost
description: Restore %{RESTORE_CHARGES} charges on your %{ITEM:DUNGEONBREAKER} after collecting a secret.

name: One Punch
description: After all other damage add %{ENDERMAN_DAMAGE} damage to the first strike against %{MOB:ENDERMAN} and %{MOB:ENDERMITE}.

name: Recharge
description: Regain %{MANA_RECHARGE} %{STAT:MANA} after killing an %{MOB:ENDERMAN} or %{MOB:ENDERMITE}.

name: Rageborn
description: Gain %{DRAGON_FEROCITY} %{STAT:FEROCITY} against %{MOB:DRAGON}.

name: Zealuck
description: Increases the chance to find a special Zealot by %{SPECIAL_ZEALOT_CHANCE}.

name: Ender Training
description: Gain %{COMBAT_WISDOM} %{STAT:COMBAT_WISDOM} while in %{ZONE:THE_END}.

name: Infused Dragon
description: Increases the %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} of your Ender Dragon Pet by %{EDRAG_CRIT_DAMAGE}.

name: Unbridled Rage
description: Increases Berserk class experience gain by %{BERS_EXP_GAIN}.

name: Two-Headed Strike
description: Renowned and Spiked Reforges apply an extra %{REFORGE_ATTACK_SPEED} %{STAT:BONUS_ATTACK_SPEED} on your gear.

name: Dragon Piper
description:
Gain %{SUPERIOR_SPAWN_CHANCE} chance to spawn a Superior Dragon if you placed a Summoning Eye.
%{FORMAT:GRAY}This perk only applies once per dragon across players.

name: Empowered Agility
description: Reduces the %{STAT:MANA} cost of some movement abilities by %{MOVEMENT_MANA_REDUCTION}.

name: Vermin Control
description: Receive %{SPIDER_DAMAGE_REDUCTION} less damage from Spiders.

name: Bane
description: Increases damage dealt to Spiders by %{SPIDER_DAMAGE_INCREASE}.

name: Spider Training
description: Increases your %{STAT:COMBAT_WISDOM} by %{COMBAT_WISDOM} while on the %{ZONE:SPIDERS_DEN}.

name: Toxophilite
description: Increases Archer class experience gain by %{ARCHER_EXP_GAIN}.

name: Cold Efficiency
description: Increases Mage class experience gain by %{MAGE_EXP_GAIN}.

name: Cooled Forges
description: %{DOUBLE_ESSENCE_CHANCE} chance to get double ESSENCE when salvaging.

name: Frozen Skin
description: Grants %{COLD_RESISTANCE} %{STAT:COLD_RESISTANCE}.

name: Season Of Joy
description: Gain %{BONUS_GIFT_DROPS} extra Gifts from the Gift Attack event.

name: Drake Piper
description: Increases the chance to spawn a Reindrake by %{REINDRAKE_SPAWN_CHANCE} while fishing on %{ZONE:JERRYS_WORKSHOP}.

name: Strongarm
description: Your Fishing Rods pull Supplies and Fuel Cells %{PULL_DISTANCE} further during the %{KEYWORD:KUUDRA_BOSS_FIGHT}.

name: Fresh Tools
description: %{BALLISTA_SPEED_CHANCE} chance to double the speed of repairing Elle's Ballista for 10s during the %{KEYWORD:KUUDRA_BOSS_FIGHT}.

name: Headstart
description: Start the %{KEYWORD:KUUDRA_BOSS_FIGHT} with %{STARTING_TOKENS} %{KEYWORDS:KUUDRA_TOKEN}.

name: Kuudra Master
description: Deal %{MINION_DAMAGE} increased damage to %{KEYWORDS:KUUDRAS_MINION} multiplied by the highest defeated wave in that tier or higher. %{FORMAT:GRAY}Max 10%

name: Fungus Fortuna
description: Gain %{MYCELIUM_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MINING_FORTUNE} when mining Mycelium.

name: Harena Fortuna
description: Gain %{RED_SAND_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MINING_FORTUNE} when mining Red Sand.

name: Crimson Training
description: Increases your %{STAT:COMBAT_WISDOM} by %{COMBAT_WISDOM} while on the %{ZONE:CRIMSON_ISLE} and in the %{KEYWORD:KUUDRA_BOSS_FIGHT}.

name: Wither Piper
description: %{VANQUISHER_SPAWN_CHANCE} increased chance to find %{MOBS:VANQUISHER} on the %{ZONE:CRIMSON_ISLE}.

name: Heart of Gold
description: Increases Healer class experience gain by %{HEALER_EXP_GAIN}.

name: Treasure of the Earth
description: Increases your chances of spawning a %{MOB:WORM} or %{MOB:SCATHA} when mining %{ITEM:HARD_STONE} by %{WORM_SPAWN_CHANCE}.

name: Dwarven Training
description: Increases your %{STAT:MINING_WISDOM} by %{MINING_WISDOM} while on %{ZONE:MINING_ISLANDS}.

name: Unbreaking
description: Increases your %{STAT:VITALITY} by %{VITALITY}.

name: Eager Miner
description: Increase your %{STAT:MINING_SPEED} by %{MINING_SPEED} while on %{ZONE:MINING_ISLANDS}.

name: Midas Lure
description: Increases your chances of fishing up a %{KEYWORD:TROPHY_FISH_GOLD} in the %{ZONE:CRIMSON_ISLE} by %{TROPHY_FISH_GOLD_CHANCE}.

name: Radiant Fisher
description: Increases your chances of fishing up a %{KEYWORD:TROPHY_FISH_DIAMOND} in the %{ZONE:CRIMSON_ISLE} by %{TROPHY_FISH_DIAMOND_CHANCE}.

name: Diamond in the Rough
description: Increases Tank class experience gain by %{TANK_EXP_GAIN}.

name: Rhinestone Infusion
description: Grants %{GEMSTONE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:GEMSTONE_FORTUNE}.

name: Under Pressure
description: Increases your %{STAT:STRENGTH} by %{STRENGTH} while on %{ZONE:MINING_ISLANDS}.

name: High Roller
description: Get %{EXTRA_NUCLEUS_DROP} extra random drop when obtaining a Crystal Nucleus Bundle.

name: Return to Sender
description: Increases the chances of a %{KEYWORD:DIAMOND_GOBLIN} spawning by %{DIAMOND_GOBLIN_CHANCE}.

name: Trapped
description: Your Traps now catch creatures by %{TRAP_SPEED} faster.

name: Axed
description: All the stats on your axes are %{AXE_STATS} stronger.

name: Extreme Pressure
description: Increases your %{STAT:PRESSURE_RESISTANCE} by %{PRESSURE_RESISTANCE}.

name: Lumberjack
description: Increases your %{STAT:FORAGING_FORTUNE} by %{FORAGING_FORTUNE}.

name: Tasty
description: Your Berry items are %{BERRY_BUFF} stronger.

name: Forest Training
description: Increases your %{STAT:FORAGING_WISDOM} by %{FORAGING_WISDOM} while on the %{ZONE:FORAGING_ISLANDS}.

name: Blessing of Time
Agatha's Power
description: Grants %{SWEEP} %{STAT:SWEEP}.

name: Fig Fortune
description: Grants %{FIG_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FIG_FORTUNE}.

name: Fig Personal Best
description:
You gain %{SWEEP_SCALAR} %{STAT:SWEEP} for every
100 Extra Fig Collection
during her contest.
%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}(Max 100k collection).

name: Mangrove Fortune
description: Grants %{MANGROVE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MANGROVE_FORTUNE}.

name: Mangrove Personal Best
description:
You gain %{SWEEP_SCALAR} %{STAT:SWEEP} for every
100 Extra Mangrove Collection
during her contest.
%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}(Max 100k collection).
